text.title: Cross-Tool Migration — Agentic Workflows and Gotchas
text.summary: Recommended subagents, prompt patterns, and failure modes for agent-assisted PM tool migrations.

list.item: migration-auditor (sonnet) — runs pre-migration audit, returns YAML with counts, custom fields, integrations.
field-mapper (sonnet) — proposes source-to-target field mappings and lookup tables; flags ambiguities for human decision.
dry-run-extractor (haiku) — calls source API read-only, validates auth, counts records, exports to JSONL.
mapping-validator (haiku) — checks mapping coverage: 100% of source fields either mapped or explicitly dropped.

example.code: You are field-mapper. Inputs: source_schema.json, target_schema.json, org_policy.md. Output a Markdown table with columns: source_field, target_field, transformation, ambiguity_flag. Where mapping is lossy or ambiguous, set ambiguity_flag=YES and propose two alternatives. Do not invent target fields not in source_schema.json.

antipattern.description: Agents running migration without a resumable checkpoint file per issue ID.
antipattern.reason: Rate limits and network failures crash mid-batch migrations. Without a checkpoint file (last successfully migrated ID), the entire run must restart from the beginning.

antipattern.description: Agents migrating @mentions without user ID resolution.
antipattern.reason: Source and target user IDs differ. Unresolved @mentions silently become plain text or broken links. Resolve user ID mapping in advance; log and drop unresolvable mentions.

antipattern.description: Accepting an LLM-estimated migration cost without a 2x multiplier.
antipattern.reason: LLM migration estimates are systematically low; they omit training, parallel-run period, and integration rebuild cost. Multiply by 2x minimum and add a parallel-run period.

rule.statement: Human-in-the-loop checkpoints are mandatory at: mapping approval, cutover go/no-go decision, and rollback decisions.
rule.rationale: Each is an irreversible or high-impact decision. Agent errors at these gates compound into expensive remediation.

text.reference: Post-migration source vs target count validation
Field mapping table with ambiguity flags
